AliasOfPlainModeled.description:
Same underlying Named target (PlainTarget — still unannotated by
design) but the alias itself carries `swagger:model`. The
annotation preserves the alias name at every use site; without
it the alias dissolves to PlainTarget. The witness pair below
pins both halves on one canvas.
AliasOfPlainModeled.title: AliasOfPlainModeled is the ANNOTATED counterpart of AliasOfPlain.

PlainTarget.description:
It must end up in spec.definitions only via the orchestrator's
discovery of the alias's RHS — not via any implicit lookup side
effect at scan time.
PlainTarget.title: PlainTarget is a user struct with no swagger:model annotation.

witnessModeledResponse.description:
WitnessResponseModeled mirrors WitnessParamsModeled on the
response side — the annotation preserves the alias's identity
at the body response schema for opted-in users.

witnessResponse.description:
WitnessResponse has a response body whose Go type is the same
alias — mirror witness on the response builder's
buildFieldAlias path.
